title: Table Booking Bot
description: AI agent for restaurants that handles reservations 24/7
fullDescription: AI agent for restaurants that handles reservations 24/7. Problem: Manual booking was taking 3 hours/day. Solution: Automated booking system that manages tables, sends confirmations, and handles special requests. Result: Saved 20+ hours/week and increased bookings by 30%.

title: Customer Support Automation
description: AI-powered customer service for UK estate agencies
fullDescription: AI-powered customer service for UK estate agencies. Problem: Lead response time was 2+ hours. Solution: Instant AI engagement that qualifies leads and schedules meetings. Result: 50% faster response times and 40% higher conversion rates.

title: Inventory Check Automation
description: Automated inventory management for retail businesses
fullDescription: Automated inventory management for retail businesses. Problem: Manual stock checks caused frequent outages. Solution: AI system that tracks inventory levels and reorders automatically. Result: Reduced stockouts by 80% and saved 15 hours/week.

title: Restaurant Feedback Agent
description: Automated customer feedback collection for restaurants
fullDescription: Automated customer feedback collection for restaurants. Problem: Getting customer reviews was inconsistent. Solution: AI that automatically requests feedback after meals and analyzes responses. Result: 3x more reviews and improved customer satisfaction scores.

title: Shopify Analytics Agent
fullDescription: Automated reporting for e-commerce stores. Problem: Owners spent hours analyzing sales data manually. Solution: AI that generates daily business insights and identifies trends automatically. Result: Saved 10+ hours/week and better inventory decisions.

title: Client Onboarding Workflow
description: Automated client setup for service businesses
fullDescription: Automated client setup for service businesses. Problem: Manual onboarding took 3 days and had errors. Solution: AI workflow that handles paperwork, scheduling, and setup automatically. Result: 70% faster onboarding and zero errors.
